title: polypodium pellucidum var. pellucidum
intro: Polypodium pellucidum var. pellucidum, also known as Clear-webbed Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Polypodium pellucidum var. pellucidum can be made by infusing the dried leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts as a topical application for skin irritations.
